description: The Glue component is generated by the GlueTool when the user press and drags primary with the tool equipped. The mode on that tool determines what this component's ``GlueMode`` will be.

fields.GlueMode: How to Glue the objects in the area or effect.
fields.Active: Whether this component is ready to glue.
fields.DryTime: How long it takes for this Glue to dry.
fields.Expire: When this component should delete itself in world time.
fields.GluingUser: The user that is gluing this glue.
fields._forceDry: Whether to force dry this glue.
fields.isDrying: Whether this Glue is currently drying or not.
fields.dryStartTime: When the user triggerd this Glue to start drying in world time.
